Featured Lessons

Seven Academy

Learning Hub

Structured courses from beginner foundations to advanced-level trading.

🔒 LOCKED
COURSE 01
Beginner Trading Course
Designed for complete beginners who want to build a strong foundation before risking capital. Covers how financial markets work, how traders think, and how to build proper habits from day one.
📚 3 Modules
📖 14 Chapters
🎯 Beginner
🔒Module 1 — Introduction to Financial Markets
▼
  • What is Forex?
  • Market Participants
  • Currency Pairs
  • Bid & Ask
  • Spread Explained
🔒Module 2 — Trading Foundations
▼
  • Market Sessions
  • Chart Types
  • Order Types
  • Risk Basics
🔒Module 3 — Trader Development
▼
  • Trading Psychology
  • Discipline
  • Journal Building
  • Trading Plan
🔒 LOCKED
COURSE 02
Intermediate Trading Course
Focused on helping traders transition from theory into structured execution and risk management. Bridges the gap between knowing and doing.
📚 3 Modules
📖 11 Chapters
🎯 Intermediate
🔒Module 1 — Market Structure
▼
  • Trend Identification
  • Swing Analysis
  • Internal Structure
🔒Module 2 — Execution Concepts
▼
  • Entry Logic
  • Stop Placement
  • Trade Management
🔒Module 3 — Performance
▼
  • Journal Analysis
  • Mistake Tracking
  • Consistency Metrics
🔒 LOCKED
COURSE 03
Advanced Trading Course
Institutional-style trading concepts focused on market behavior, auction theory, and advanced execution. Built for traders ready to operate at the next level.
📚 4 Modules
📖 17 Chapters
🎯 Advanced
🔒Module 1 — Price Action Mastery
▼
  • Liquidity Concepts
  • Rejections
  • Continuations
  • Traps
🔒Module 2 — Market Structure Mastery
▼
  • Advanced Structure
  • Market Context
  • Session Dynamics
🔒Module 3 — Volume Profile
▼
  • HVN
  • LVN
  • POC
  • Value Area
🔒Module 4 — Auction Market Theory
▼
  • Balance
  • Imbalance
  • Acceptance
  • Rejection
🔒 LOCKED
COURSE 04
Prop Firm Trading Program
Built specifically for traders pursuing funded accounts and long-term capital allocation. Focus on challenge passing, account preservation, consistency, and payout sustainability.
📚 3 Modules
📖 9 Chapters
🎯 Funded Traders
🔒Module 1 — Challenge Strategy
▼
  • Evaluation Phases
  • Rule Interpretation
  • Risk Allocation
🔒Module 2 — Account Protection
▼
  • Drawdown Management
  • Scaling Risk
  • Consistency
🔒Module 3 — Funded Account Operations
▼
  • Payout Protection
  • Capital Preservation
  • Growth Planning
🔒 COMING SOON

Highest institutional liquidity period — peak volume and volatility for premium setups.

Market Intelligence

Market News

Key economic events and news affecting traded instruments. High-impact events are no-trade conditions under the Seven Academy rules.

Recommended Platforms

Brokers & Prop Firms

Platforms selected for reliability, execution quality, and prop firm structure.

IC Markets
⭐ Recommended Broker

Institutional-grade raw spread execution. Preferred broker for Volume Profile and intraday execution.

  • Raw spread from 0.0 pips
  • Tier-1 regulated
  • MT4/MT5/cTrader
  • Fast execution
Visit IC Markets →
FundedNext
Prop Firm

Up to $200K funded. Competitive payout structure with transparent rules.

  • Up to 95% profit share
  • Free retry on breach
  • Flexible challenge types
Visit FundedNext →
FundingPips
Prop Firm

Straightforward challenges with competitive conditions and fast payouts.

  • Unlimited scaling plan
  • Weekly payouts available
  • Simple rules
Visit FundingPips →
The 5%ers
Prop Firm

Instant funding options with high scaling potential for consistent performers.

  • Instant funding available
  • Scale to $4M
  • No time limits
Visit The 5%ers →
FTMO
Prop Firm

Industry benchmark for prop firm challenges. Established credibility and structured evaluation.

  • Up to $400K scaling
  • Proven track record
  • Detailed statistics
Visit FTMO →
TradingView
📊 Charting Platform

Professional charting with Volume Profile tools, multi-timeframe analysis, and real-time data.

  • Volume Profile indicators
  • Multi-timeframe analysis
  • Pine Script automation
  • Real-time alerts

Free Resources

Educational Resources

Core educational materials for structured trading development. No fluff. Just process.

📖
Beginner's Guide
Foundation concepts for new traders: sessions, timeframes, basic structure, and risk management fundamentals.
FREE
🛡️
Risk Management Guide
Position sizing, drawdown limits, weekly loss rules, and capital preservation principles for sustainable trading.
FREE
🧠
Trading Psychology
Discipline, emotional control, process-vs-outcome thinking, and building consistency over the long term.
FREE
🏦
Prop Firm Guide
Passing challenges, avoiding common mistakes, managing funded accounts, and scaling discipline to larger capital.
FREE
📊
Volume Profile Guide
LVN/HVN identification, VAH/VAL rotation theory, POC dynamics, and applying volume profile to intraday execution.
FREE
📓
Trading Journal
How to log entries, exits, and reasoning — building the habit of honest review that separates process-driven traders from gamblers.
FREE
About Seven Academy

The Edge Is Process

Disciplined methodology — not prediction, not gut feel. Repeatable process applied with precision.

📅
4+ Years Trading Experience
Years of live market execution across personal and funded accounts.
🏦
Manages Personal & Funded Accounts
Prop firm challenges and personal capital managed under one framework.
🏛️
Institutional Execution
LVN Rejection, VA Rotation & Value Acceptance — structure-based stops, defined management.
📊
Volume Profile & Structure
LVN/HVN, VAH/VAL, POC mapping with multi-timeframe directional bias.
🛡️
Risk Management
Fixed 1% risk per trade, minimum 1:3 R:R, weekly loss limits enforced.
🧠
Psychology & Journaling
Mechanical execution, emotional journaling, edge tracked over 100+ trades.
🕯️
Price Action
Engulfing & Pin Bar confirmation with volume-backed rejection or acceptance.
🌍
London & New York Sessions
Execution restricted to the highest-liquidity institutional trading windows.

Seven Academy Trade Checklist

Run this checklist before every trade entry. The score determines your setup grade and execution protocol.

Pre-Entry Conditions
Score: 0 / 6
—
Select conditions above
Awaiting input...
Score Guide
5–6 / 6 A+ Setup — Execute Immediately
4 / 6 A Setup — Standard Management
≤ 3 / 6 No Trade — Full Discipline
"Inactivity is a valid and disciplined outcome. No trade is better than a poor trade."
— Seven Academy Framework
